brief_notes: Well-organized narrative covering the same scientific pipeline but quantitative detail is notably reduced. The MPRA table only lists parameters without results. Cross-cell-type correlations table lacks replicate comparisons in full. Design strategies table lists algorithms without predicted MRL values. Gene editing table uses qualitative comparisons ('>40%', 'Exceeds all controls') instead of exact percentages for each design. The discussion is competent. Overall adequate but the missing numerical detail undermines reproducibility and precise evaluation.
